# 旋转卡壳求最小矩形覆盖

```cpp
    double get_project(Point a, Point b, Point c){
        return dot(b - a, c - a) / (b - a).length();
    }
    vector<Point> get_min_rectangle(vector<Point> hull,double &min_area){
        // 旋转卡壳求最小矩形覆盖
        // andrew判断需要改成<=
        // ans[4]四个顶点逆序
        if(is_line(hull)){
            min_area=0;
            return {hull[0],hull[0],hull.back(),hull.back()};
        }
        vector<Point> ans(4);
        int n=hull.size();
        hull.push_back(hull[0]);
        for(int i=0,a=2,b=1,c=2;i<n;i++){
            auto d=hull[i],e=hull[i+1];
            while(cmp(area(d,e,hull[a]),area(d,e,hull[a+1]))<0)a=(a+1)%n;
            while(cmp(get_project(d,e,hull[b]),get_project(d,e,hull[b+1]))<0)b=(b+1)%n;
            if(!i)c=a;
            while(cmp(get_project(d,e,hull[c]),get_project(d,e,hull[c+1]))>0)c=(c+1)%n;
            auto x=hull[a],y=hull[b],z=hull[c];
            auto h=area(d,e,x)/(e-d).length();
            auto w=dot(y-z,e-d)/(e-d).length();
            if(h*w<min_area){
                min_area=h*w;
                ans[0] = d + (e - d).norm() * get_project(d, e, y);
                ans[3] = d + (e - d).norm() * get_project(d, e, z);
                auto u = (rotate(e - d, -PI / 2)).norm();
                ans[1] = ans[0] + u * h;
                ans[2] = ans[3] + u * h;            
            }
        }
        for(int i=0;i<4;i++){
            if(!sign(ans[i].x))ans[i].x=0;
            if(!sign(ans[i].y))ans[i].y=0;
        }
        return ans;
    }
```
